sql: SELECT * FROM users u WHERE u.id IN (SELECT o.user_id FROM orders o WHERE o.id IN (SELECT op.order_id FROM order_products op WHERE op.product_id IN (#{productIds}) AND op.quantity >= #{minQuantity}) GROUP BY o.user_id HAVING SUM(o.amount) >= #{minOrderAmount}) AND u.status = #{userStatus} ORDER BY #{sortField}
templateSql:
SELECT *
FROM users u
WHERE u.id IN (
    SELECT o.user_id FROM orders o
    WHERE o.id IN (
        SELECT op.order_id FROM order_products op
        WHERE op.product_id IN
        <choose>
            <when test="productIds != null and productIds.size() > 0">
                <foreach collection="productIds" item="pid" open="(" separator="," close=")">
                    #{pid}
                </foreach>
            </when>
            <otherwise>SELECT id FROM products WHERE category = #{category}</otherwise>
        </choose>
        <if test="minQuantity != null">
            AND op.quantity >= #{minQuantity}
        </if>
    )
    <if test="minOrderAmount != null">
        GROUP BY o.user_id HAVING SUM(o.amount) >= #{minOrderAmount}
    </if>
)
<if test="userStatus != null">
    AND u.status = #{userStatus}
</if>
<if test="sortField != null">
    ORDER BY ${sortField}
</if>
